initiatives.title: Voyage Shopify integration (Admin API)
initiatives.summary: Custom MCP server (voyage) talks to Voyage's Shopify Admin GraphQL. Recent-orders, orders-by-day, recent-customers, plus the 5-sales-90d guardrail used by every write operation.

initiatives.title: Daily rotating SEO audit
initiatives.summary: Scans 100 products/day. Flags missing meta description, title length issues, alt-text gaps, $0 prices, placeholders. Honours the 5-sales-90d no-touch rule.

initiatives.title: Daily catalog hygiene + sitemap diff
initiatives.summary: Compares today's product sitemap to yesterday's. Flags adds, removes, URL changes. Spot-checks 20 random products via the Shopify .json endpoint for $0/no-images/placeholders.

initiatives.title: Daily Google indexation tracker
initiatives.summary: Records sitemap product count + (when scraping isn't blocked) Google site: indexed count + delta vs yesterday. Long-term: swap to Search Console API for accuracy.

initiatives.title: Voyage daily blog · 3-day pipeline
initiatives.summary: Day 1 picks topic + outline. Day 2 writes the 1000w article as a Shopify DRAFT. Day 3 auto-publishes live unless you've deleted the draft. Rotates 7 categories weekly. Friendly-expert blog voice.

initiatives.title: Voyage social media · FB + IG
initiatives.summary: Daily product post (11:00 AEST), Sunday weekly deals carousel, Tue+Fri educational/how-to. Aussie casual tone with emoji. Posts to Voyage FB Page + @voyagecollectionaustralia IG.

initiatives.title: Shopify token auto-refresh (Voyage + Gifts Hub)
initiatives.summary: Windows scheduled task runs daily at 06:00 AEST. Re-runs OAuth client_credentials, updates wrappers for both stores, restarts the gateway so MCP servers pick up the new tokens.

initiatives.title: Gifts Hub Shopify integration
initiatives.summary: Custom MCP server (giftshub-plus) for Gifts Hub Shopify analytics. Recent-orders / orders-by-day / recent-customers via Admin GraphQL.

initiatives.title: Daily Jim Rohn quote · Telegram
initiatives.summary: 8:00 AEST daily. Agent fetches a Jim Rohn quote and delivers it to your Telegram chat.

initiatives.title: This dashboard
initiatives.summary: Public PWA at farhaadbaig89-sys.github.io/voyage-ops. Auto-refreshes every 30s, regenerated locally + git-pushed every 5 min.
